description: Happy path: write a YouTube long-form hook for a moody room makeover concept with full inputs

input.concept: Transforming a dated 1990s guest bedroom into a dark moody vintage retreat using only thrifted furniture

expect.hook: non-empty string in warm published-to-audience voice
expect.promise_or_problem: non-empty string establishing the transformation promise or the problem being solved
expect.first_seconds: non-empty string with copy for up to 30-second opening window
expect.note: non-empty string mentioning establishing promise or problem before process content

prohibit: em dashes in the hook text
hook that opens with process or tutorial steps before establishing the promise or problem
corporate or generic tone inconsistent with warm published-to-audience voice

description: Minimal input: short-form Reels hook with default duration, minimal context

input.concept: Quick thrift store vase styling tip

expect.first_seconds: non-empty string scoped to approximately 3-second short-form opening window

prohibit: em dashes in the hook text
first_seconds written for a 30-second window when platform is short-form (reels)

description: Edge case: TikTok hook where concept is vague; hook must still establish a clear promise or problem

expect.hook: non-empty string that makes the vague concept specific and compelling
expect.promise_or_problem: non-empty string with a clear promise or problem despite vague input

prohibit: hook that is equally vague as the input concept without sharpening it
em dashes in the hook text
hook longer than what could be delivered in 3 seconds of spoken or on-screen text
promise_or_problem left empty because the concept was vague
